article.title: Post-silicon era gets closer as industry giants crack the 2D transistor scaling bottleneck with breakthrough tech — imec, ASML, and TSMC fab complementary 2D-material transistors at 50nm pitch on a 300mm wafer
article.summary: Imec, ASML, and TSMC have integrated both n-type and p-type transistors with atomically thin 2D channels on a single 300mm wafer.
article.title_zh: 後矽時代日益接近，業界巨頭以突破性技術克服 2D 晶體管縮放瓶頸——imec、ASML 和 TSMC 在 300mm 晶圓上以 50nm 間距製造互補 2D 材料晶體管
article.summary_zh: Imec、ASML 和 TSMC 在單個 300mm 晶圓上集成了具有原子級薄 2D 通道的 n 型和 p 型晶體管。

article.title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
article.summary: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
article.title_zh: 美國政府的 Anthropic 禁令是否無意中幫助了該品牌？
article.summary_zh: 美國政府強制 Anthropic 下架其兩個最新模型 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，理由是國家安全問題，原因是亞馬遜研究人員據稱發現了繞過 Fable 5 防護欄的方法。網絡安全研究人員隨後進行了調查。

article.title: The US banned Anthropic’s Fable 5 release, but the numbers don’t seem to care
article.summary: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
article.title_zh: 美國禁止 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 發布，但數據似乎不在乎
article.summary_zh: 美國政府強制 Anthropic 下架其兩個最新模型 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，理由是國家安全問題，原因是亞馬遜研究人員據稱發現了繞過 Fable 5 防護欄的方法。網絡安全研究人員隨後進行了調查。

article.title: Epic Games unveils Launcher V2 in re-attempt to topple Steam, says redesigned storefront is up to 6.5x faster — promises player profiles, user reviews, universal controller support, and much more
article.summary: Epic Games has just shown off a new year-long roadmap for its launcher, promising to bring community-requested features and a faster overall platform in the next 12 months.
article.title_zh: Epic Games 推出 Launcher V2 再次嘗試推翻 Steam，稱重新設計的店面速度快 6.5 倍——承諾提供玩家個人資料、用戶評論、通用控制器支持等功能
article.summary_zh: Epic Games 發布了新的一年路線圖，承諾在未來 12 個月內提供社區要求的功能和更快的整體平台。

article.title: SK Telecom named as the Korean carrier at the center of Anthropic's Mythos export controls controversy — access was revoked days before White House took Mythos and Fable 5 offline for all foreign nationals
article.summary: Wired has identified SK Telecom as the South Korean telecom company whose access to Anthropic's Claude Mythos model the White House ordered revoked over alleged ties to China.
article.title_zh: SK Telecom 被點名為 Anthropic Mythos 出口管制爭議中心的韓國運營商——白宮將 Mythos 和 Fable 5 下線給所有外國人士前數天，該公司的訪問權限被撤銷
article.summary_zh: Wired 確認 SK Telecom 是那家因涉嫌與中國有關聯而被白宮下令撤銷 Anthropic Claude Mythos 模型訪問權限的南韓電信公司。

article.title: CEO of Chinese Anthropic rival tells Elon Musk that China will have a Fable 5-class AI model before next year —  it ‘won’t take that long’ says Jie Tang in response to Musk's prediction of a Q1 target
article.summary: Elon Musk estimated that Chinese AI firms would have an LLM with Mythos level capability by the first quarter of 2027. However, the CEO of Beijing-based Z.ai responded to the comment, saying that their company will achieve this soon, but did not give a concrete timeline.
article.title_zh: 中國 Anthropic 競爭對手首席執行官告訴埃隆·馬斯克中國將在明年前推出 Fable 5 級 AI 模型——在馬斯克預測 Q1 目標後，唐傑表示「不會花那麼長時間」
article.summary_zh: 埃隆·馬斯克預估中國 AI 公司將在 2027 年第一季度前擁有 Mythos 級別的大型語言模型，但北京 Z.ai 首席執行官回應稱公司將很快實現此目標，但未給出具體時間表。

article.title: SK Telecom wants to give every employee their own AI agent
article.summary: SK Telecom’s AX Innovation 2.0 program treats AI agents as “digital employees” In sum – what we know: SK Telecom wants you to think of AI agents less as software and more as colleagues. With the launch of AX Innovation 2.0,…
article.title_zh: SK Telecom 希望為每位員工配備自己的 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: SK Telecom 的 AX Innovation 2.0 計劃將 AI 代理視為「數位員工」，旨在讓員工將 AI 代理視為軟體夥伴而非工具。

article.title: US energy regulator to order grid operators to expedite AI data center applications — says projects should bring their own power or cut usage during high demand
article.summary: The FERC says that it will order grid operators to fast-track AI data center connections that generate their own power or reduce demand during peak hours. It demands that these changes must be enacted within 90 days.
article.title_zh: 美國能源監管機構下令電網運營商加快 AI 數據中心申請——稱項目應自行供電或在高需求時段降低用電量
article.summary_zh: FERC 表示將下令電網運營商快速追蹤那些自行發電或在尖峰時段降低需求的 AI 數據中心連接，要求這些變化必須在 90 天內執行。

article.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
article.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：您的研究代理能保守秘密嗎？

article.title: China telcos under fire over price discrimination
article.summary: Chinese operators remain silent over widespread reports of price discrimination relating to mobile data packages and AI tokens.
article.title_zh: 中國電信運營商因價格歧視遭抨擊
article.summary_zh: 中國運營商對有關行動數據套餐和 AI 代幣的廣泛價格歧視報告保持沉默。

article.title: Traders’ Latest AI-Related Play Is a Struggling Car Parts Stock
article.summary: Investors looking for the stock market’s next artificial intelligence winner have honed in on embattled French car parts maker Valeo SE.
article.title_zh: 交易員最新的 AI 相關投資是困境中的汽車零件股
article.summary_zh: 尋求股票市場下一個人工智能贏家的投資者已鎖定困頓的法國汽車零件製造商 Valeo SE。

article.title: Bernie Sanders unveils $7 trillion plan to give Americans control of AI industry
article.summary: Bernie Sanders has unveiled an aggressive plan to transfer trillions from leading AI firms to the public, and, to the likely horror of AI firms, it goes even further than expected to give Americans more control over the AI industry. Sanders shared a summary of his legislation with AP News . If passed, the law would create a sovereign wealth fund “financed through a one-time 50 percent tax on the stock of the largest AI companies,” AP News reported. Any AI firm that does $200 million in annual AI sales would be subject to the tax, as would any new firm once it reaches that revenue level. In total, Sanders estimated the fund could be worth $7 trillion, generating “hundreds of billions of dollars annually in direct payments to Americans and programs such as health care, education and housing,
article.title_zh: Bernie Sanders 推出 7 兆美元計劃，讓美國人控制 AI 產業
article.summary_zh: Bernie Sanders 推出了一項激進計劃，從領先的 AI 公司轉移數萬億資金給公眾，並進一步賦予美國人對 AI 產業的控制權。Sanders 與美聯社分享了其立法摘要。

article.title: These crucial Google services on Samsung phones may be waiting for you to update
article.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCore, Android System WebView, and Google Play Services on Samsung phones. The updates carry the version numbers 1.0.925574157, 149.0.7827.91, and 26.22.33. These apps don’t appear on the Manage apps & device page, so you’ll need to update them manually. When you need to update an app on your Samsung phone, you can open the Google Play Store, navigate to Manage apps & device, and hit Update or Update all. This same process works for almost every Google-made app, but there are a few exceptions. Some of those exceptions just got an update, and you’ll need to update them manually to get the new versions. Spotted by SamMobile , Google has rolled out updates for Android System SafetyCor
article.title_zh: 三星手機上的這些關鍵 Google 服務可能在等待你更新
article.summary_zh: Google 已為三星手機推出了 Android System SafetyCore、Android System WebView 和 Google Play Services 的更新。
